title: sturmia lucida
intro: Sturmia lucida, also known as the "Clear Eye" or "Clear Sight" herb, is a plant species native to certain regions of Asia. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sturmia lucida include improved vision, reduced eye strain, and enhanced cognitive function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy for eye and brain-related issues.
